# F-5 fixture #15 (T012 — should-NOT-fire)
# Allow-list mechanism: path regex `node_modules/.*` in `.gitleaks.toml` allow-list 3
# Simulated path: node_modules/<filename> (runner copies to TMPDIR/node_modules/...)
# Why this exists: vendored content under node_modules/ may carry test credentials from
# upstream packages — gitleaks should NOT scan these (we don't control them)

AWS_KEY = "AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE"
